synopsis: A Queen steps down! The Hidden Fortress destroyed! The Imperial army on the march! Annikin Starkiller and Princess Leia rescue two wayward droids in the desert, Darth Vader recruits a famous Knight of the Sith to his army, and a squad of lazersword-wielding Stormtroopers attempt to arrest Jedi General Luke Skywalker! * The adaptation of George Lucas’s original rough-draft screenplay for Star Wars! * The Star Wars you thought you’d never see!
title: The Star Wars #3
